title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Akshaya Private Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Akshaya Private Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Real Estate Agent to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
